subject: Joint Distributions
topic: §41 Sum of Two Independent Random Variables: Discrete Case
question: An insurance company determines that $N$, the number of claims received in a week, is a random variable with $P[N=n] = \frac{1}{2^{n+1}}$, where $n \ge 0$. The company also determines that the number of claims received in a given week is independent of the number of claims received in any other week. Determine the probability that exactly seven claims will be received during a given two-week period.
